summary: Post-v2.0-pre-publish cleanup + active injection layer, shipped as v2.0.0-rc.5..N → v2.0.0 stable (v2.0.0 commit tagged locally but never published). rc.5 retires L0/L1/L2 wire residue, deletes intent-ledger compliance regime + dashboard + root /templates + Cocos hardcoding, adds dual pending root, introduces relevance_scope + relevance_paths schema with archive Skill viability gate, closes consumption tracking via knowledge_consumed event, fixes revision_hash to exclude pending. rc.6 adds SessionStart broad-injection hook + PreToolUse narrow-injection hook with session-hints cache + edit-counter sidecar, upgrades archive Signal A to 24h-OR-20-edits.

implementation_scope.objective: Cleanup v1.x wire residue + finalize narrow-schema + close consumption loop
implementation_scope.rationale: v2.0 pivot left L0/L1/L2 protocol, intent-ledger compliance regime, dashboard package, Cocos hardcoding, and selection_policy dead fields. Zero users means clean-slate is cheaper than carrying these into rc.6 hook layer. Path-aware narrow filter is precondition for rc.6 PreToolUse hook being non-redundant with SessionStart.
acceptance_criteria: MCP tool registry contains 4 tools: fab_plan_context / fab_get_knowledge_sections / fab_extract_knowledge / fab_review (no fab_get_rule_sections)
MCP server name = fabric-knowledge-server (no fabric-context-server)
agents.meta nodes lack fields: level, layer, deps, topology_type, priority

plan_context output lacks fields: selection_policy, required_stable_ids, ai_selectable_stable_ids, initial_selected_stable_ids; gains: candidates_full_content when ≤30 candidates (single-stage degenerate mode)
plan_context filters by relevance_paths: broad ∪ narrow-matching-input-path
Server file names: knowledge-meta-builder / knowledge-sections / knowledge-sync / get-knowledge / api/knowledge.ts / api/knowledge-context.ts / tools/knowledge-sections.ts (rename complete)
Deleted from disk: services/annotate-intent.ts, services/human-lock-or-equivalent.ts, services/audit-log.ts, api/intent.ts, .fabric/audit.jsonl, .fabric/forensic.json
Kept on disk: services/serve-lock.ts, services/in-flight-tracker.ts, services/rehydrate-state.ts, services/read-ledger.ts (verified still used)
Deleted from disk: packages/dashboard/ entire package, templates/ root directory, examples/werewolf-minigame-stub/, 思路.md
pnpm-workspace.yaml or package.json no longer references @fenglimg/fabric-dashboard
Frontmatter parser recognizes relevance_scope and relevance_paths fields; defaults to broad + [] when absent
fabric-archive Skill SKILL.md contains Phase 0.5 viability gate with archive-signal + anti-archive-signal lists; user-explicit invocation bypass documented
fabric-archive Skill SKILL.md contains Phase 1.5 scope decision rules; default broad
fabric-archive Skill generates relevance_paths from edit_paths only (no read_paths, no body regex)
fabric-archive Skill applies public-prefix generalization with depth ≤ 2 and minGroupSize=2
fabric-archive Skill applies glob blacklist: **/*.<ext>, repo-root single files
fabric-import skill writes all candidates with relevance_scope=broad, relevance_paths=[]
fab_review.modify supports relevance_scope + relevance_paths changes on pending AND canonical entries
fab_review.modify detects narrow team → personal flip and auto-degrades scope to broad, clears relevance_paths, emits knowledge_scope_degraded event
fab_extract_knowledge writes pending to ~/.fabric/knowledge/pending/<type>/ when layer=personal; otherwise to .fabric/knowledge/pending/<type>/
fab_review.list enumerates both pending roots
doctor --apply-lint pending >30d auto-archives to .archive/pending/ (or ~/.fabric/.archive/pending/) and emits pending_auto_archived event
doctor lint #22 underseeded: nodes<10 reports recommendation to run fabric-import
doctor lint #23 narrow_no_paths: narrow entry with empty relevance_paths emits warning
doctor lint #24 relevance_paths_dangling: --apply-lint removes dangling globs and auto-degrades scope to broad when all paths danged; emits knowledge_path_dangled + knowledge_scope_degraded events
doctor lint #25 relevance_paths_drift: report-only, suggests fab_review.modify
fab_get_knowledge_sections service writes knowledge_consumed event per fetched stable_id (deduped within request); event includes stable_id, session_id, client_hash, consumed_at
Lint orphan_demote (#16) uses last_consumed_at derived from knowledge_consumed events instead of last_referenced
fabric-hint.cjs (renamed from archive-hint.cjs) outputs JSON with recommended_skill field
fabric-hint Signal A = 24h since last knowledge_proposed event (no plan_context count, no edit count in rc.5)
fabric-hint Signal C = nodes<10 AND time_since_last_init>=24h AND no knowledge_proposed event in last 24h
Hook configs complete for all three clients: claude-code.json / codex-hooks.json / cursor-hooks.json (Stop hook in all)
computeRevision in rule-meta-builder.ts excludes pending/ directory nodes
Adding/removing/rejecting a pending entry does NOT change revision_hash; approving (which moves pending→canonical) does
fabric plan-context-hint CLI subcommand registered; outputs versioned JSON to stdout {version:1, revision_hash, target_paths, narrow:[{id,type,maturity,summary}], broad_count}
fabric plan-context-hint --paths reads relevance_paths filter; --all returns full broad+narrow set
README rewritten with 8 真特色 enumeration + 4 deliberately-not-done + MCP-vs-CLI adapter clarification + vs-Tencent-article position
scripts/rc5-coverage-gate.mjs passes following rc.4 coverage gate pattern
Dogfood test on Fabric self repo: complete archive→review→consume→lint cycle end-to-end with new fields
implementation_scope.change_summary: v1.x residue removal (4 items A1-A4) + boundary fixes (4 items B1-B4) + narrow schema with consumption tracking (7 items C1-C7) + CLI infrastructure and docs (2 items D1-D2). Total 17 items. New event types: knowledge_consumed, pending_auto_archived, knowledge_path_dangled, knowledge_scope_degraded. 4 new lint checks (#22-#25).

implementation_scope.objective: Active knowledge injection layer via SessionStart + PreToolUse hooks
implementation_scope.rationale: rc.5 closes the WRITE/READ half (archive + consume) but knowledge stays cold unless Agent proactively calls plan_context. The article's 16-stage workflow injection equivalent for a harness-agnostic system is per-event hooks. SessionStart provides broadcast awareness; PreToolUse provides path-precise reminder. Together they convert passive knowledge into active reminders without polluting Agent context per the user-requested noise discipline.
acceptance_criteria: knowledge-hint-broad.cjs registered as SessionStart hook in all three client configs
knowledge-hint-broad.cjs invokes `fabric plan-context-hint --all`, parses JSON stdout, renders stderr summary
Rendering rule: ≤30 entries → full per-type listing (one line each); >30 entries → grouped truncation (proven full / verified id-list / draft count-only)
knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs registered as PreToolUse hook with matchers Edit / Write / MultiEdit in all three client configs
knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs reads tool_input.file_path (and MultiEdit edits[].file_path), dedupes
knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs invokes `fabric plan-context-hint --paths <p1,p2,...>`, parses JSON
narrow matched > 0 → stderr emits title list (id + type + maturity + summary-line) + one-line footer reminder for broad
narrow matched == 0 → no stderr output, exit 0 (complete silence)
.fabric/.cache/session-hints-{session_id}.json maintained: hinted_paths set + last_emitted_index_hash, keyed by revision_hash
PreToolUse skips emit when path already hinted in current session
PreToolUse skips emit when matched narrow's index hash equals last_emitted_index_hash
Session-hints cache invalidated wholesale on revision_hash change
doctor cleans session-hints files older than 7 days
PreToolUse hook appends Date.now() timestamp line to .fabric/.cache/edit-counter per invocation
fabric-hint.cjs Signal A upgraded: reads edit-counter, counts lines since last knowledge_proposed event ts, triggers on 20 lines OR 24h elapsed (whichever first)
fabric-config.json adds archive_edit_threshold (default 20)
doctor lint #26 narrow_too_few: count(narrow with paths) / total < 0.20 AND total ≥ 10 → recommends fabric-import
PreToolUse silent-counter telemetry: .fabric/.cache/hint-silence-counter tracks silent rate over 30-day window
doctor reports hint silence rate > 95% over 30 days as same fabric-import recommendation
scripts/rc6-coverage-gate.mjs passes
Dogfood test: open session, observe SessionStart inject + Edit triggering narrow inject + same-file second Edit silent + revision change re-inject
implementation_scope.change_summary: Two new hook scripts (broad + narrow) + sidecar edit-counter + session-hints cache. fabric-hint Signal A upgrades to consume edit-counter. One new lint check #26 + telemetry. No new MCP tools, no new schema fields. Builds entirely on rc.5 infrastructure (relevance_paths filtering, knowledge_consumed event, revision_hash-excludes-pending).

code_anchors.snippet: selection_policy.required_levels: ['L0','L2']; required: level==='L0'||'L2'; selectable: level==='L1'; levelOrder switch
code_anchors.significance: All L0/L1/L2 dead branches and dead fields — rc.5 A1+A3 target removal site

code_anchors.snippet: inferDomains 'UI'/'Gameplay'/'Asset' + tokenizeIntent '性能/drawcall/卡顿/图集' + inferImpactHints 'Performance' regex
code_anchors.significance: Cocos hardcoding — rc.5 A3 target removal

code_anchors.snippet: buildDescriptionIndex — builds description_index from agents.meta nodes
code_anchors.significance: rc.5 C3 adds relevance_paths filter; output entries shed level/required/selectable, retain type/maturity/layer/layer_reason

code_anchors.snippet: KNOWLEDGE_SUBDIRS literal includes 'pending'; computeRevision joins all nodes
code_anchors.significance: rc.5 C7 changes computeRevision to exclude pending; rc.6 cache correctness depends on this
rc.5 B1 makes pending base layer-dependent (function pendingBase(layer))

code_anchors.snippet: Registers fab_plan_context, fab_get_rule_sections; server name fabric-context-server
code_anchors.significance: rc.5 A1 renames tool to fab_get_knowledge_sections + server to fabric-knowledge-server

code_anchors.snippet: Lint checks #1-#21 in additive list pattern
code_anchors.significance: rc.5 adds #22-#25 following same pattern; rc.6 adds #26
rc.5 B3+C6 reworks: rename to fabric-hint.cjs; Signal A becomes 24h-only; adds Signal C with 24h-post-init cooldown; structured JSON output with recommended_skill field

code_anchors.snippet: (file not present or empty per rc.2 gap)
code_anchors.significance: rc.5 B4 fills Cursor + Codex hook configs to parity with claude-code.json

code_anchors.snippet: Current 3-phase flow without viability gate or scope decision
code_anchors.significance: rc.5 C2 inserts Phase 0.5 viability gate and Phase 1.5 scope decision; Phase 1 candidate format gains [scope=narrow|broad]
rc.5 C3 extends modify to canonical paths + layer-flip auto-degrade detection

key_findings: v1.x L0/L1/L2 protocol carries zero signal in v2.0 data (all 16 nodes are L1; required/selectable both static)
Intent-ledger compliance regime has 31/31 audit entries with matched_get_rules_ts=null (zero adoption)
dashboard package has 31 references to L0/L1/L2/topology in views, zero references to knowledge/pending — v1.x ghost
Root templates/ directory has 0 references from CLI source; authoritative templates live under packages/cli/templates/
plan-context.ts hardcodes Cocos game-perf signals (UI/Gameplay/Asset, 性能/drawcall/卡顿/图集) from werewolf-minigame era
scope_glob in agents.meta is the knowledge file's own namespace, NOT a binding to code paths — current data has no code-path-to-knowledge binding mechanism
Existing recent_paths field in extract-knowledge input conflates Edit/Write and Read; signal hierarchy mandates Edit/Write only for relevance_paths
fab_plan_context and fabric plan-context-hint are NOT redundant — same engine planContext(), different adapters (MCP for Agent, CLI for hooks without node_modules)
knowledge consumption tracking absent: plan_context emits knowledge_context_planned but only candidate enumeration, not actual reading
PreToolUse hook with relevance_paths filter is the harness-agnostic equivalent of the article's 16-stage workflow injection
computeRevision currently includes pending nodes, which would over-invalidate rc.6 PreToolUse cache
Cursor and Codex hook configs are empty/missing — rc.2 acceptance criteria for cross-client coverage incomplete
fabric-import is LLM-driven (not session-driven) and cannot generate accurate relevance_paths from git history; default-broad is safer
Article's 5-layer storage rejected (Fabric stays 2-layer); article's 16-stage workflow rejected (Fabric is harness-agnostic) — these are deliberate boundaries, not gaps
decision_context: v2.0.0 commit tagged stable locally but never published → release line treated as still in RC pipeline; rc.5/rc.6 continue the rc.1-rc.4 chain rather than starting v2.0.1 patch line; free to break wire/schema

Single signal source (edit_paths only) for relevance_paths generation chosen over multi-signal (edit + read + body-regex + symbols) for rc.5 simplicity; multi-signal deferred to rc.7 if data shows insufficient recall
scope (narrow vs broad) decided subjectively by Agent in archive Skill Phase 1.5 with explicit rule block; default broad as safe偏置
fabric-import produces broad+empty-paths uniformly; narrowing deferred to user review via fab_review.modify
narrow team → personal layer flip auto-degrades scope to broad (personal knowledge crosses projects, paths don't generalize)
fabric-hint Signal A in rc.5 = 24h time-only (drop plan_context count due to hook auto-fire unreliability); rc.6 upgrades to 24h OR 20 edits via PreToolUse sidecar (.fabric/.cache/edit-counter)
computeRevision rc.5 fix: exclude pending/ from hash to prevent rc.6 PreToolUse cache thrashing
PreToolUse output discipline: narrow titles + one-line broad footer only on narrow match; complete silence on zero match
Hook silence is feature not bug: > 95% silence rate over 30 days signals KB narrow-ratio degradation, triggers doctor recommendation to re-run fabric-import
CLI plan-context-hint outputs versioned JSON to stdout; hook scripts render stderr — decoupled evolution
Signal C (underseeded) gated by 24h-post-init cooldown to avoid pestering user immediately after fabric init
MCP fab_plan_context retained as Agent's pull-mode補查 entry point for: mid-session topic switch / context compaction / non-Edit analysis / cross-file reasoning
Lint #24 auto-mutation (path dangle) is safe (file deletion is fact); Lint #25 (rename drift) is heuristic so report-only
follow_ups_post_rc6: Symbol-based relevance binding (`relevance_symbols`) for refactor resilience
body_referenced_paths secondary signal in archive Skill if recall insufficient
Tag-based binding as alternative association axis
LLM-driven monthly relevance_paths refresh in doctor
v2.1: independent team-knowledge.git repo + 3-role permission model
